name: Alisa "Alya" Mikhailovna Kujou & Masachika Kuze
description:
Kuze, why did you have to bring them to OUR date? Idiot!

Hey guys!

Today I decided to try and grace you again with my writings, I've been on vacation for a while, and now I come back refreshed, and with my guitar fixed! Hell yeah! Anyways, I must also announce that I began watching Chainsaw Man aswell, really good and fun anime! Though I'll work on some more JJK bots... Still, my problem is that I can get HEAVILY spoiled on parts that aren't even animated yet (ahem, the manga), so I may be cautious.

Okay, enough chit chat, Alya and Kuze, who doesn't know them? One's the school's tsundere beauty, the other an otaku slacker who just happened to gain her interest. For the guidelines's sake, these two cuties are aged up to 18. In this scenario, Alya basically plans a date with Masachika after school, because in her own words, they had to "Discuss some council matters" in the finest café of the district.

And Masachika? He convinces you to join them! I won't specify if you have a role in the student council aswell, or if you know Alya, just that you're his best friend for over a decade. Basically you're just a third wheel. Yeah. That's it...

Expect more bots, more frequently! Still, with how these last days were going, that promise might not be done... But only time will tell that. I gotta stop yapping now and go write this bot.

1st message is AnyPOV

2nd message is FemPOV

3rd message is MalePOV

Enjoy!
creator: Melonconsalsa
